{{Infobox starship
| name = Moonfall
| introduced = The Captain
}}

''See also: [[Moonfall Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Moonfall is a dark gray scout frigate designed for rapid travel during long subspace journeys. Its physical structure resembles a scorpion with an elevated tail, featuring forward-facing cannons located near its central body. While the vessel is equipped with plasma weaponry and an artificial intelligence for navigation, it lacks the durability to withstand heavy military attacks. The ship's shields are capable of producing a pale green flicker, though it remains vulnerable to catastrophic hull failure and structural damage. Moonfall is capable of atmospheric flight and can carry groups of students, such as a class of forty, for short-distance travel across the surface of an artificial moon.}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Moonfall is a scorpion-shaped scout frigate owned by the narrator and piloted by [[Varic Vallenar]]. Designed for speed during long [[Subspace]] runs, this starship is equipped with plasma cannons and previously crashed into the [[Iron Hive]]. As a ship's computer, Moonfall utilizes an audio implant interface and speakers to provide internal diagnostics, announcements, and navigational inquiries to the [[Captain]]. During the events of this journey, the vessel's environment was such that the protagonist's clothing was destroyed.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a ship that crashed into the [[Iron Hive]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a starship equipped with plasma cannons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] has an audio implant interface for communication.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a voice that provides navigational inquiries to the [[Captain]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a scorpion-shaped ship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4">''The Captain'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is piloted by [[Varic Vallenar]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c4" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] communicates through speakers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5">''The Captain'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a scout frigate designed for speed on long [[Subspace]] runs.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a ship's computer that provides internal diagnostics and announcements.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c7">''The Captain'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a ship owned by the narrator.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c9">''The Captain'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a frigate.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c11">''The Captain'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] is a starship.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16">''The Captain'', chapter 16</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The protagonist's clothes were destroyed on [[Moonfall]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Moonfall]] has plasma cannons.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c33">''The Captain'', chapter 33</ref>}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The [[Captain]] was previously relying on [[Moonfall]]’s sensors.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c45">''The Knight'', chapter 45</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|Moonfall’s smooth voice interrupted my thoughts. “Awaiting navigational data. Where would you like to go, Captain?”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|"The Zenith Starship," Moonfall answered through its speakers.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|I briefly cut off my incantation to say, “That’s my ship! They didn’t blow it up.”<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c16" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Starships]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
